privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic LibreOffice Writer document containing safety meeting minutes dated October 12, 2023. The input document is generated by setup_task.sh using python-docx with 28 paragraphs including a main title, 5 section headers (Attendance, Previous Incidents, Excavation Safety Review, PPE Compliance, Upcoming Hazards), and 4 action items marked with 'ACTION:' prefix. The task requires: (1) applying Heading 1 style to the main title and Heading 2 to all section headers; (2) creating a custom paragraph style named 'Action Item' with a box border, yellow background shading, and 0.5-inch left and right indents; (3) applying this custom style to the 4 ACTION paragraphs; (4) inserting a Table of Contents; and (5) saving as site_42_formatted.docx. All file paths, document structure, style requirements, and metadata specifications have been independently verified against the source code.
